overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse apartment from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera pans across a modern interior featuring a jacuzzi and lounge chairs, overlooking a neon-lit futuristic cityscape through floor-to-ceiling glass windows. The scene is set at night with vibrant holographic advertisements illuminating the rain-slicked streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living room with bar area

agents.ego_description: standing still and panning slowly across the apartment interior, taking in the view of the city and furnishings

entered.detail: large rectangular jacuzzi with steaming water and illuminated edges
tall illuminated vending machine displaying colorful advertisements and neon lighting
modern bar counter with stools and overhead lighting
modern leather lounge chairs arranged facing the window
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing the cityscape
tall building covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
dense futuristic cityscape with illuminated high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the right side of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment, featuring a glowing vending machine and bar area. The camera slowly pans left across polished marble floors, revealing a steaming jacuzzi and modern lounge chairs arranged before massive glass windows. Outside, the neon-lit cityscape glows against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: central living area with panoramic city view

events.description: vending machine exits the frame as the camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan across the room, shifting focus from the bar area to the central living space

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow leftward pan across the apartment's center, with the vending machine and bar exiting the frame. The jacuzzi remains central while the view outside shifts to show different angles of the neon-lit skyline. The holographic advertisements on the distant towers change and flicker with various colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: left side living area with additional seating

events.description: floor lamp and potted plant enter view on the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic view by focusing on the left side of the apartment and the remaining lounge seating

entered.detail: small modern floor lamp with warm light near the lounge chairs
tall indoor plant in the corner near the glass wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the left side of the penthouse, where additional lounge chairs and a floor lamp come into view. A potted plant sits in the corner near the glass wall. The camera completes its panoramic sweep, showing the full breadth of the luxury apartment and the sprawling cyberpunk city beyond the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous panoramic sweep across a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse that gradually reveals the full scale of a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins on the right side of the apartment by a glowing vending machine and bar area, moving across polished marble floors toward a steaming jacuzzi and modern lounge chairs. As the camera continues its leftward pan, the interior bar exits the frame and the focus shifts toward the massive glass windows, where holographic advertisements on distant towers flicker and change colors against the night sky. The scene then expands to reveal the far left side of the penthouse, passing additional lounge chairs, a floor lamp, and a potted plant in the corner. Finally, the camera completes its sweep, capturing the entire breadth of the opulent interior set against the sprawling, vibrant cityscape beyond the glass.
